description: Excommunication (破門) procedure. Triggered by Charter §2(a)-(h) severe violation evidenced by ≥2 independent attestations. Enforces G12: Council Lv6+ ≥4/7 + 30-day cure period + on-chain memorial record. Schema enforces curePeriodEndsAt > cureWindowStartsAt + 30 days. Reversal requires fresh Adherent ceremony (no fast-track restoration). Rabbinic-court analog: documents the breach, not the person's character.

subjectDid.description: DID of the member subject to the procedure.

charterViolationCategory.description: Charter Rider §2 sub-category alleged. Severe violation only — minor breaches handled via mediation cell, not excommunication.

evidenceAttestationCids.description: ≥2 independent on-chain attestations evidencing the violation (constitutional minimum for excommunication initiation).

cureWindowStartsAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC start of the 30-day cure period (G12 invariant).

curePeriodEndsAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC end of the 30-day cure period. MUST be ≥ cureWindowStartsAt + 30 days (G12 structural enforcement).

cureAttempts.description: Member-initiated cure attempts during the 30-day window. May be empty if member chose not to cure.

councilAttestations.description: ≥4 of 7 Council seat DIDs attesting finalization (Lv6+ ≥4/7 supermajority per G12).

finalizedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of finalization vote. MUST be ≥ curePeriodEndsAt.

automaticSbtRevokeTxCid.description: On-chain Adherent SBT revoke transaction CID. MUST be emitted at finalization.

memorialRecordCid.description: On-chain memorial record CID (documents the breach + cure-attempt summary; NO PII beyond DID + category).

reversalRequiresFreshCeremony.description: Constitutional invariant — re-onboarding requires fresh Adherent ceremony (no fast-track restoration).

attestingDid.description: DID of Council seat emitting this procedure record.
